verdict: Formulated specifically for xerosis with gentle sulfate-free cleansing and skin-conditioning agents. Niacinamide supports barrier function, though the formula is relatively basic for its price point.

_research.name: Cetaphil Pro Dry Skin Body Wash
pros: Suitable for very dry, sensitive skin
_research.con: Lacks exfoliating or treatment-level actives; primarily a gentle cleanser.
